description.ko: 바다의 가장 깊고 어두운 곳에서 거대하고 투명한 존재가 추는 평화로운 춤을 묘사합니다.
description.en: A peaceful dance of a colossal, transparent entity in the deepest, darkest reaches of the ocean.

prompt: A highly detailed, cinematic 8k render of a 'Bioluminescent Leviathan' in the AQUA-5 zone. A massive, translucent sea creature composed of glowing #40E0D0 turquoise bubbles and #48D1CC teal membranes, drifting through the dark #000080 midnight zone. Schools of glass fish swim through fluid #006994 ocean currents and marine snow. Volumetric lighting captures the serene, high-pressure atmosphere. Ray-traced reflections.
